prestazioni: 1KZ-TE 3.0L turbo-diesel engine (130hp stock) upgraded with a Garrett GT2860RS turbocharger, custom 3-inch stainless steel downpipe by HKS, and a full 4-inch straight-pipe exhaust system with a Tomei 80mm titanium muffler for reduced backpressure and aggressive diesel tone

Custom ECU remap by Haltech Elite 2500 with flex-fuel capability, supporting E85 blends, paired with a 3.5-bar MAP sensor and a dual Bosch 0280158002 fuel pump setup for high-flow diesel injection at 2,200 bar pressure

Koyoritsu Racing full billet aluminum intercooler with a 40% larger core than OEM, paired with a custom water-methanol injection system by Snow Performance (Stage 3) to eliminate intake temps and prevent diesel knock under high boost (targeting 28psi on pump diesel)
estetica: Liberty Walk LB-SURF widebody kit (Hilux Surf-specific, not generic) with custom carbon fiber fender flares, extended by 3 inches per side to accommodate 10.5-inch-wide Work Meister S1 3P wheels (17x9 +22 offset) with Toyo Open Country MT tires (285/70R17)

Custom front bumper delete with a JDM-spec Toyota Mega Cruiser-inspired steel tube front bumper by Shrockworks, featuring integrated DRLs (Morimoto XB LED pods) and a Warn Zeon 12-S winch with synthetic rope

Full interior overhaul with Bride Zeta III bucket seats (JDM-spec, bolt-in Hilux Surf mounting brackets), Takata 4-point harnesses, and a custom roll cage by Custom Cages UK (FIA-spec, bolt-in design for Hilux Surf chassis) with powder-coated red finish
